C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\visualizer.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\visualizer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\visualizer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\visualizer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o visualizer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libvisualizer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\visualizer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
